job.title: Full Stack Engineer
job.description: Leading web integrations with EVM smart contracts and post-quantum cryptography. Applied agentic engineering principles end-to-end from ideation to verification, reducing feature lead time by 70% (from weeks to days). Modeled heterogeneous event streams with monadic principles and RxJS, eliminating an entire class of race conditions across async pipelines. Achieved 85% integration test coverage, enabling zero-headache refactors and reducing regression incidents. Partnered with Product and Marketing to deliver pixel-perfect, animated experiences.

job.title: Senior Software Engineer
job.description: Senior engineer on the Live Betting team, serving 2M+ daily active users across 15+ markets. Built and scaled frontend systems with Vue 3, Vuex, Tailwind, and SignalR, processing realtime market updates. Architected a composable, functional rendering pipeline that cut UI re-render time to milliseconds and reduced bundle size by 30%. Drove a 22% increase in player conversion rate and a 35% reduction in time-to-bet through targeted UX optimisations. Led cross-team architectural initiatives and mentored junior and mid-level engineers.

job.title: Backend Developer
job.description: Modernised a 15-year-old Zend Framework 1 monolith, migrating to a Laravel-based microservices architecture. Enhanced content search with Elasticsearch, improving query latency and accuracy. Delivered backend services in PHP, Laravel, and MySQL serving hundreds of thousands of users. Collaborated with a React frontend team to expose new search APIs.

job.title: Full-stack Developer
job.description: Full-stack engineer for Phi, a reactive, cross-platform 3D CAD web platform integrating with OnShape. Stack: Node.js, Express, TypeScript, Vue, PostgreSQL, three.js — owning features from database schema to WebGL rendering. Drove test coverage from 0% to 80%, introduced strict TypeScript across 100% of the codebase, and built CI/CD pipelines automating release cycles. Reduced JS bundle size (20MB → 1.9MB), delivering sub-second Time to Interactive on average. Shipped a complete visual refresh, tablet/pen interaction layer, Stripe billing integration. Mentored new engineers.

job.title: Full-stack Developer, DevOps
job.description: Full-stack development in PHP, Laravel, Lumen, Vue, SQL Server, and MariaDB across 5+ internal applications. Architected CI/CD pipelines on GitLab and Docker, reducing deployment time by 80% and eliminating manual release steps. Delivered order-automation tooling, saving an estimated 20 staff-hours per week. Built BI analytics dashboards and ERP extensions adopted across departments, improving operational reporting turnaround. Mentored 2 junior engineers and established team-wide code review and testing standards.

foss.description: Paid open-source contributor to the Electron desktop application (React, TypeScript), resolving Linux-specific bugs.

Founded and coordinated the Greek translation team, growing it to 4 active volunteers and delivering hundreds of thousands of translated words. Managed content workflows in WordPress and built internal tooling in jQuery, improving operational efficiency.
